20.reason: Error: This should be b[k]=i; not b[i]=1; The current code sets b[i] to 1 instead of storing the permutation value i at position k.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Logic error: b should store the value at position k, not index i. Should be b[k]=i. Using b[i]=1 incorrectly sets all positions to 1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Logical error: should assign the current number i to the k-th position in the permutation array, i.e., b[k]=i;
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Logical error: incorrectly assigns 1 to index i. Should store the current number i at the k-th position of the permutation array: b[k]=i;

4.reason: [Array size should be at least 11 to accommodate index up to N (1..N). Using a[10] and b[10] leads to out-of-bounds access when i=10.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Array size should be at least 11 to accommodate index up to N (1..N). Using a[10] and b[10] leads to out-of-bounds access when i=10.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Array size is insufficient for N=10 since indices 1 to 10 are accessed, causing out-of-bounds. Should be at least 11.
